title: Kulbergs puts temporary stop to ICT procurements in Latvia
summary_full: Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs (AS) has imposed a 30-day moratorium on large and expensive information and communication technology (ICT) procurements to review their necessity and procurement procedures, LETA reports on June 15.
